details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest 24/7 day pass under $30 for 15th of next month
Task 2: Reserve least expensive 4-person meeting room with screen & whiteboard for 2h morning under $80
Task 3: Choose cheapest 24/7 membership with >=4 meeting hours under $300/month
Task 4: Register for cheapest beginner evening workshop under $40
Task 5: Book 3-hour space session with addon on upcoming Saturday and checkout with pay_on_arrival
Task 6: Join "UX & Product Design" group and RSVP Going to next meetup-like event
Task 7: Message photographer with rating >=4 and hourly rate < $60 about collaboration
Task 8: Purchase 10-day pass bundle and small locker under $250 subtotal with CREATE10 promo
